name: ruby-net-telnet
title: ruby-net-telnet
description:
telnet client library
This package provides a telnet client library to use in Ruby programs. It used
to be part of the Ruby standard library before Ruby 2.3, and was extracted to
a standalone package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-net-telnet because telnet client library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-net-telnet as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-net-telnet with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-net-telnet --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
